items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Hackers Can Go From CitrixBleed 2 Exploitation to Ransomware in Under an Hour
id: 65cc07c3-4b1f-538c-8298-d49a8246d6b4
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Hackers Can Go From CitrixBleed 2 Exploitation to Ransomware in Under an Hour (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RANSOMWARE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Hackers Can Go From CitrixBleed 2 Exploitation to Ransomware in Under an Hour
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/10
modified: 2026/07/10
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_encrypt:
        TargetFilename|endswith:
            - '.locked'
            - '.encrypted'
            - '.crypted'
            - '.enc'
        EventID: 11
    selection_ransomnote:
        TargetFilename|contains:
            - 'README'
            - 'HOW_TO_DECRYPT'
            - 'RECOVER_FILES'
    selection_vssdelete:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'vssadmin delete shadows'
            - 'wmic shadowcopy delete'
            - 'bcdedit /set'
    condition: selection_encrypt or selection_ransomnote or selection_vssdelete
falsepositives:
    - Encryption software (VeraCrypt, BitLocker) in use
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Hackers Can Go From CitrixBleed 2 Exploitation to Ransomware in Under an Hour — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-10T14:21:23Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "Hackers Can Go From CitrixBleed 2 Exploitation to Ransomware in Under an Hour", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Hackers Can Go From CitrixBleed 2 Exploitation to Ransomware in Under an Hour Exploitation Attempt - RANSOMWARE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"vssadmin"; nocase; content:"delete shadows"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6943816; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-10, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: High confidence based on: Item is listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities; EPSS score 99.900 (very high exploitation probability)

confidence_factors.signal: Item is listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities

items.title: CVE-2026-24699: An OS command injection vulnerability exists in the sub_34984() function of the "rc" binary in Cisco RV130/RV130W with f
items.description: An OS command injection vulnerability exists in the sub_34984() function of the "rc" binary in Cisco RV130/RV130W with firmware 1.0.3.55 and RV110W routers with firmware 1.2.2.5 / 1.2.2.8. The lan_ipv6_prefixlen configuration parameter is not properly sanitized, which could allow an authenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary OS commands with root privileges.

items.title: Ubiquiti Patches Critical UniFi OS Flaws Allowing Command Injection and Privilege Escalation
items.description: Ubiquiti patched seven UniFi OS flaws, including critical CVE-2026-50746, which allows command injection in UniFi Connect Application. Ubiquiti released security updates for seven critical UniFi OS vulnerabilities, including a maximum-severity flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-50746 (CVSS score of 10.0), enabling command injection attacks. The issue affects UniFi Connect Application versions 3.4.16 and earlier, a platform used […]

items.title: CVE-2026-41878 - Insecure Direct Object Reference in R-SOFT DMS
items.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-41878
 
 Published : July 10, 2026, 10:16 a.m. | 1hour, 54minutes ago
 
 Description : R-SOFT DMS is vulnerable toInsecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) attack in multiple file download endpoints. The application fetches files from the database by ID and serves them to whoever requests them, relying only on session authentication, meaning any valid user can access any file.

This issue was fixed in version v3.19-2862and v3.17-2580.
 
 Severity: 7.1 | HIGH

items.title: Tesla: Authorization header leaks on cross-origin redirect via case-sensitive filtering
items.description:
### Summary

`Tesla.Middleware.FollowRedirects` is meant to strip the `Authorization` header when following a cross-origin redirect, but performs the check with a case-sensitive comparison against the lowercase string `"authorization"`. Because Tesla preserves header keys exactly as supplied by the caller, any application that sets the header with its RFC 7235 canonical casing (`"Authorization"`) bypasses the filter entirely, leaking bearer tokens or other credentials to whatever origin the redirect points at.

### Details

The filter list in `lib/tesla/middleware/follow_redirects.ex` is defined as `@filter_headers ["authorization", "host"]` and the membership check `k not in @filter_headers` compares the raw key string without case normalization. HTTP header names are case-insensitive per RFC 7230, but Tesla stores them verbatim. A header tuple `{"Authorization", "Bearer …"}` does not match `"authorization"`, so it passes through the filter and is forwarded to the redirect destination
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window
items.apex_ai_summary: [HIGH] Vulnerability advisory. Risk score 7.6/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

items.title: CVE-2026-41877 - Stored XSS in R-SOFT DMS
items.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-41877
 
 Published : July 10, 2026, 10:16 a.m. | 1hour, 54minutes ago
 
 Description : R-SOFT DMS is vulnerable to Stored XSS in file upload functionality. Authenticated attacker can inject arbitrary HTML and JS into the nameof the file being uploaded, which will be executed when visiting file list or upload status by other users.

This issue was fixed in version v3.19-2832and v3.17-2580.
 
 Severity: 5.1 | MEDIUM

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-41877 - Stored XSS in R-SOFT DMS
id: e4b8a809-3da3-56b1-b175-8d2a4de125b1
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-41877 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: XSS
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41877
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/10
modified: 2026/07/10
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: webserver
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-41877 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-10T14:21:23Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-41877", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-41877 Exploitation Attempt - XSS"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2197779; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-10, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: Single source with minimal corroborating evidence
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.title: CVE-2026-59703: repomix contains a local file inclusion vulnerability in the git clone endpoint that allows unauthenticated attackers to
items.description: repomix contains a local file inclusion vulnerability in the git clone endpoint that allows unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary local git repositories. The isValidRemoteValue function in src/core/git/gitRemoteParse.ts fails to block file:// URLs, permitting attackers to supply file:// scheme URLs that bypass validation and are passed directly to git clone, enabling unauthorized access to all tracked file contents on the server filesystem.
items.apex_ai_summary: [HIGH] CVE advisory. Risk score 7.5/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.
items.ioc_note: Actor-attribution campaign — IOC set derived from threat actor research, not automated feed extraction.
